name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations and same-day funding options.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating a nationwide network of physical locations, with a significant presence across multiple states including Colorado. The company has positioned itself as a one-stop shop for consumers needing quick access to cash and financial services, particularly those in underserved markets or facing urgent financial needs. Based on their website navigation and service offerings, ACE has been operating long enough to build a multi-state infrastructure and maintain multiple customer service channels.

ACE Cash Express provides a diverse range of financial products designed to address various emergency and non-emergency cash needs. Their primary offerings include installment loans, title loans, check cashing services, bill payment processing, money transfers, tax preparation services, and online loan options. The company advertises online loan availability and maintains both general and internet-specific customer service lines, indicating an omnichannel approach to service delivery. They also mention a rewards program (Target gift card promotion) suggesting loyalty incentives for customers.

The company distinguishes itself through its physical store network combined with online loan offerings, providing consumers with multiple access channels. ACE operates location-specific services, as evidenced by their store locator functionality and state-by-state service availability notifications. Their multi-service approach allows customers to address various financial needs—from emergency cash to tax services—at a single provider, which may offer convenience for repeat customers. The company maintains active customer service infrastructure with dedicated phone lines and email support.

A critical limitation evident from the website data is the inconsistent service availability across states, with specific notices that certain loan products are not available in particular states (such as Colorado in the tested URLs). The website encountered 404 errors on specific location pages, suggesting potential data maintenance issues or service discontinuation in certain areas. Consumers considering ACE should verify that their specific financial needs and loan type are actually available in their state before proceeding, as the company's service portfolio varies significantly by jurisdiction.
pros: Multiple service options in one location (loans, check cashing, bill payments, tax services, money transfers)
Online loan application available alongside physical store locations
Same-day and next-day funding advertised for emergency cash needs
Toll-free customer service lines dedicated to different inquiry types
State-specific compliance measures (California Notice at Collection displayed)
Rewards program incentives mentioned (Target gift card promotion)
Store locator functionality helps find nearby locations
cons: Service availability varies significantly by state; specific loan products unavailable in certain states like Colorado
Website 404 errors on location-specific pages indicate potential service gaps or maintenance issues
No transparent pricing, APR, or fee information visible on website excerpts
Title loans and payday-style products carry inherent risks of debt cycles and vehicle loss
Emergency cash products typically feature high interest rates standard to the industry
best_for: Consumers needing quick access to cash for immediate expenses
Individuals with vehicle equity who qualify for title loans
Customers requiring check cashing or bill payment services without a traditional bank
People seeking tax preparation services combined with other financial products
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is appropriate for consumers facing immediate cash needs who have access to a physical location in their state and can confirm that their desired loan product is available in their jurisdiction. The primary caveat is verifying state-by-state service availability before applying, as the website clearly indicates service limitations that vary by location, and consumers should understand the high-cost nature of title loans and emergency cash products.
services: Customer service via phone and email

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
